arts.ttl: Chelsea facing fight to keep in-demand defender after £40m transfer
arts.sum: “The relationship with the coach is good and every player knows what they have to do," Disasi said when asked of Maresca's methods earlier this summer. Whilst his future remains uncertain, fellow Chelsea stars such as Raheem Sterling and Ben Chilwell have been forced to suffer the same fate, frozen out by Maresca's tough love at Stamford Bridge since taking over.

arts.ttl: Chelsea defender Tosin Adarabioyo ESCAPES an early red card after bringing down Liverpool's Diogo Jota at Anfield - despite incident mirroring William Saliba's dismissal for Arsenal
arts.sum: Adarabioyo was guilty of fouling Jota after the forward burst in front of him to meet a long ball and looked certain to be handed his marching orders.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville agrees as Mike Dean explains why Tosin wasn't sent off for Chelsea against Liverpool
arts.sum: Gary Neville and Mike Dean both said the incident between Liverpool and Chelsea wasn't similar to the one that saw William Saliba sent off for Arsenal against Bournemouth

arts.ttl: Same as Saliba? Chelsea survive last defender red card scare
arts.sum: Tosin is shown a yellow card for a foul on Diogo Jota, but could it have been worse for the Chelsea defender?

arts.ttl: Follow live: High-flying Liverpool host Maresca's in-form Chelsea team
arts.sum: Liverpool host Chelsea at Anfield with Arne Slot looking for a statement victory that would see his team return to the top of the Premier League table

arts.ttl: Premier League release statement on Man City winner after Liverpool rivals escape VAR check
arts.sum: Man City scored through John Stones in the 95th minute and escaped a VAR check after Bernardo Silva was stood in front of Jose Sa

arts.ttl: 'There are more reasons' - Arne Slot tells Alexis Mac Allister problem after Liverpool man left out
arts.sum: Arne Slot details the thinking behind his Liverpool team selection as Alexis Mac Allister starts on the bench against Chelsea at Anfield

arts.ttl: I was at Celtic with Virgil van Dijk – I knew he'd be a success after one moment
arts.sum: Former Celtic defender Charlie Mulgrew has revealed the one moment he realised Virgil van Dijk was the real deal after he signed for the Glasgow club

arts.ttl: Why Liverpool have a different shirt sponsor for Premier League clash with Chelsea
arts.sum: Liverpool normally wear Standard Chartered's logo on the front of their shirts but the Reds have made a one-game-only change for their match against Chelsea at Anfield

arts.ttl: Chelsea career over? Mudryk EXCLUDED for Liverpool clash
arts.sum: The Ukraine winger scored his first goal in 20 games while on international duty last week, but he has been dropped by Enzo Maresca after an underwhelming start to the new campaign. Mudryk’s exclusion from Chelsea’s squad against Liverpool comes following reports that he could leave Stamford Bridge during the January transfer window.
